# Cross-Border Procurement Considerations: Navigating International Technical Standards for Biosafety Equipment

## 适用受众
CEO

## 写作角度说明
国际采购涉及多重重合性要求和技术标准差异，需要系统性的评估框架。本角度帮助 CEO 理解跨境采购的关键考量因素，做出最优采购决策。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Cross-border procurement success hinges on understanding harmonized standards, local certification equivalents, and installation support logistics—not just unit pricing comparison.

## 参考素材
- International standards harmonization: ISO 14644 equivalent to EU GMP Annex 1, US FDA guidance
- Regional certification equivalents: CNSA test reports accepted in Southeast Asia, Middle East
- Localization requirements: voltage (220V/380V), language interfaces, local compliance documentation
- Installation logistics: international shipping, on-site installation service, customs clearance
- After-sales support across borders: remote support capability, local service engineer availability, spare parts logistics

## 关键词
Cross-Border Procurement, International Standards, Certification Equivalents, Localization, Installation Support, Global Service
